---
title: "ISI-BUDS Summer 2026 Schedule"
subtitle: "June 22rd - July 31" 
format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: Schedule
    css: style.css
    embed-resources: true
    link-external-newwindow: true
    number-sections: false
editor: source
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE}
library(fontawesome)
```

![](images/ISI-Buds-homepage-graphicv1.png){width="100%"}

The program meets daily from 9 am - 3:30 pm in DBH 2011, unless otherwise specified.
Lunch will be from noon to 1pm.

Make sure to join our **Slack workspace**, you should have received an email.
You may want to download the Slack app because we will be using this for communication throughout the program.
Make sure notifications are on.

## Day 1 - June 22, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Tech Setup | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/1-setup/1-setup.html){target="_blank"} |
| Introduction to Toolkit | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/2-intro-toolkit/2-intro-toolkit.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab (Intro Coding) | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/lab/day01-intro-coding.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab (Quarto) | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day01-prerequisites/lab/day01-quarto.html){target="_blank"} |

## Day 2 - June 23, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Working with Datasets and Describing Them With Numbers | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day02-intro-data-viz/1-data-numbers/1-data-numbers.html){target="_blank"} |
| Basics of Data Visualization | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day02-intro-data-viz/2-data-viz/2-data-viz.html){target="_blank"} |
| Principles of Data Visualization | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day02-intro-data-viz/2-data-viz/day02-slides_dataviz_principles.pdf){target="_blank"} |
| Lab Part 1 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day02-intro-data-viz/lab/day02-lab-part1.qmd){target="_blank"} |



## Day 3 - June 24, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Advanced Data Visualization | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day03-data-viz2-wrangle/1-data-viz2/1-data-viz2.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab Part 1 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day02-intro-data-viz/lab/day02-lab-part2.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| Data Wranling Part I | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day03-data-viz2-wrangle/2-data-wrangle1/2-data-wrangle1.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab Part 2 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day03-data-viz2-wrangle/lab/day03-lab-part2.qmd){target="_blank"} |

## Day 4 - June 25, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Data Wranling Part II | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day04-wrangle-dates/1-data-wrangle2/1-data-wrangle2.html){target="_blank"} |
| Dates | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day04-wrangle-dates/2-dates/2-dates.html){target="_blank"} |
| Strings | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day04-wrangle-dates/3-strings/3-strings.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 1 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day04-wrangle2-dates/lab/day04-lab-1.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 2 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day04-wrangle2-dates/lab/day04-lab-2.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| DEI Panel | | | 


## Day 5 - June 26, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Factors | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day05-factors-workflow/1-factors/1-factors.html){target="_blank"} |
| Data Science Workflow | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day05-factors-workflow/2-workflow/2-workflow.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 1 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day05-factors-workflow/lab/day05-short-lab-1.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 1 Solutions | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week1-material/day05-factors-workflow/lab/day05-short-lab-1-solutions.html){target="_blank"} |


## Day 6 - June 29, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Intro to Probability | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week2-material/day06-intro-prob/lecture_probability.html){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 1 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week2-material/day06-intro-prob/lab/2026-day06-lab.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 1 Solutions | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week2-material/day06-intro-prob/lab/2026-day06-lab-solutions.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| Research Pitch | | | 

## Day 7 - June 30, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Monte Carlo Integration | |
| Monte Carlo Inference | |
| Lab 1 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week2-material/day07-monte-carlo/lab/2026-day07-lab-part1-mc.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 2 | [`r fa(name = "desktop")`](https://isi-buds.github.io/program-2026/week2-material/day07-monte-carlo/lab/2026-day07-lab-part2-mc.qmd){target="_blank"} |
| Lab 1 Solutions |  |
| Lab 2 Solutions |  |


## Day 8 - July 1, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Bayes' Rule for Events | |
| Bayesian Models for Random Variables | |
| The Beta-Binomial Model | |
| Lab  |  |
| Lab Solutions |  |
| Research Pitch | | | 


## Day 9 - July 2, 2026

| Topic | Material |
|:-----------------------|:-----------------------|
| Balance and Sequentiality in Bayesian Analyses | |
| Posterior Inference and Prediction | |
| Lab  |  |
| Lab Solutions |  |
